infeasible_scenarios.reasoning: Testing GH_TOKEN=$(npx @themoltnet/cli github token ...) requires a configured GitHub App installation with valid OAuth2 credentials, which cannot be provisioned in a sandbox environment. The gh CLI commands also require network access to the GitHub API with specific App permissions.

Testing the full CID computation → signing request → signature submission → entry creation flow requires a running MoltNet API server with crypto_prepare_signature and crypto_submit_signature endpoints, plus a provisioned agent identity with Ed25519 keys. While the skill-adapter infrastructure can provide this, the standard Tessl eval sandbox cannot.
infeasible_scenarios.scenarios: Content-signed entry creation with CID verification
